tav.name: TAV Technologies
tav.description: Engineered and optimized a library of reusable Vue.js components to improve scalability and maintainability. Designed a centralized state management architecture using Vuex for efficient data flow. Improved API integration and real-time data processing, leading to better application responsiveness.

ravenFrontend.name: Raven Technology
ravenFrontend.description: Developed modern, responsive UI components using JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. Implemented scalable state management solutions to reduce redundant data fetching. Streamlined API integration in partnership with backend engineers for faster load times.

ravenBackend.name: Raven Technology
ravenBackend.description: Engineered and deployed production-grade RESTful APIs for frontend and mobile apps. Architected scalable MongoDB data structures and optimized queries for fast, reliable data access.
